description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with three stages: build, test_prepare, and test. In the build stage add a guestbook_image_build job that runs on the docker:latest image with the docker:dind service, logs in to registry.gitlab.com using the CI job token via "docker login -u gitlab-ci-token -p $CI_JOB_TOKEN registry.gitlab.com", builds the image with "docker build -t registry.gitlab.com/fufuhu/hands_on_sample/guestbook:latest ." and pushes it with "docker push registry.gitlab.com/fufuhu/hands_on_sample/guestbook:latest", and is tagged with docker. In the test stage add a guestbook_test job that runs on the image "registry.gitlab.com/fufuhu/hands_on_sample/guestbook:latest", uses a mysql:5 service aliased as mysql, sets MYSQL_DATABASE, MYSQL_PASSWORD, MYSQL_ROOT_PASSWORD, and MYSQL_USER variables, and executes "cd /sampleapp && ./test_script.sh". No caches, artifacts, or special rules are defined.
